strong_buy: Price is ABOVE the Ichimoku Cloud (Kumo)
buy: Price is INSIDE the Ichimoku Cloud but rising toward top
At least 3 of the 5 conditions met
neutral: Price is inside the cloud with no clear direction
sell: Price is BELOW the Ichimoku Cloud
strong_sell: Price is well below the cloud

entry: Price must be IN or ABOVE the Kumo cloud
Sector must be in overall uptrend
exit: Tenkan crosses below Kijun WITH daily close below cloud
never_enter: Price is BELOW the Kumo cloud

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
Always set a stop loss BEFORE entering
If 2 losing trades in a row, reduce position size by 50%
Max risk per trade: 3% of capital (300$ on 10K)
